text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first scene, peering into a conference room through glass, fills me with the awareness of silent observation and the subtle boundaries between insider and outsider. The second scene, with its bold "R+D" display and vibrant colors, stirs in me a philosophical excitement for discovery and innovation—as if I am bearing witness to the dialogue between humanity and its inventions. There is an undercurrent of possibility, of thought meeting action.
